title: Enhanced
description: Enhances vanilla gameplay by adding a lot of recipes and loot table changes
body:
![Title Enhanced Image](https://i.imgur.com/99F7RHS.png)

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20the%20Cave-Discord-blue?style=flat&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/DS5m9ApD)

# 🌟 Enhanced 💫

Ever wanted to gain a better experience without installing any third-party mods? Wanted to keep things vanilla? Well, Enhanced is your choice!

Enhanced is a data pack that tries to improve Vanilla Minecraft gameplay by changing some game mechanics, such as adding new crafting recipes or changing loot tables. This datapack is multiplayer-friendly so you can share the fun with your friends.

## 🔧 Features ⚙️

There are quite a few new recipes and recipe changes, such as uncrafting pretty much all blocks, furnace duration tweaks, bundles, using a stonecutter for wood blocks, and more!

Some loot tables have also changed, so exploring is now slightly better for both XP and loot (and most mobs drop at least something now). Also, action bars are now displayed while holding some items, so clocks and compasses might find a bit of use at least.

## 📝 Parity 💬

Enhanced adds lots of unique recipes and loot table changes, but what truly matters is that some of them are made for other data packs! For example, while playing with [Chains](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chains) you may want to craft lead easier, well, Enhanced adds a new lead recipe. This is only one of the examples of how Enhanced tries to improve your experience, also with other data packs!

## 🗺️ Keep Vanilla 🖼️

This data pack tries to keep vanilla as much as possible, so we decided not to add too many new features, but mainly tweak some already existing ones. So don't worry about it interrupting your vanilla gameplay too much. Anyway, have fun exploring!

---
